procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1217
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1217 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

runs.stdout:
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics

Executing test: T1217-1 List Mozilla Firefox Bookmark Database Files on FreeBSD/Linux
Exit code: 0
Done executing test: T1217-1 List Mozilla Firefox Bookmark Database Files on FreeBSD/Linux
Executing test: T1217-4 List Google Chromium Bookmark JSON Files on FreeBSD
Exit code: 0
Done executing test: T1217-4 List Google Chromium Bookmark JSON Files on FreeBSD

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1217 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1217'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1217 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Automated Collection Bookmarks Using Get-ChildItem PowerShell
Suspicious File Access to Browser Credential Storage
File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command

osquery.name: t1217_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery.name: t1217_net_enum
osquery.query_text: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';

sigma_matches.title: Automated Collection Bookmarks Using Get-ChildItem PowerShell
Suspicious File Access to Browser Credential Storage
File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 4/4 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
